instructions: Always use infrastructure/scripts/secret-update.sh when modifying Secrets Manager values — never use direct aws secretsmanager put-secret-value. Read docs/infrastructure/concerns/secrets.md for the procedure.
Provide a risk assessment before executing destructive actions (database overwrites, DNS record deletions, CloudFront modifications). Include rollback plan and severity ratings.
Confirm resources are not CDK-managed before deleting them — check CloudFormation stack outputs to verify.
Do not attempt to run background monitoring commands in rapid succession when a long-running process is active — wait for the process to complete via the background notification.
